ohtani.title: White Sox crush three homers in the 6th to power win
ohtani.blurb: Sam Antonacci, Colson Montgomery and Chase Meidroth each homer in the 6th inning to power the White Sox 6-4 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Sterlin Thompson walks it off in the 9th for 3-2 win
imanaga.blurb: Sterlin Thompson delivers a pinch-hit single in the bottom of the 9th to secure the Rockies' 3-2 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Crow-Armstrong, Ramirez lead Cubs to 6-1 win
suzuki.blurb: A three-hit day from Pete Crow-Armstrong and Pedro Ramirez's first MLB homer lead the Cubs to a 6-1 win over the Giants

yoshida.title: Nathan Eovaldi fans six in Rangers' win
yoshida.blurb: Nathan Eovaldi strikes out six Red Sox and Wyatt Langford, Kyle Higashioka hit homers in Rangers' 6-4 win

okamoto.title: Ben Rice's clutch home run leads Yankees to win
okamoto.blurb: Ben Rice hits a go-ahead home run in the top of the 9th inning to lead the Yankees to an 8-3 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Taylor, Merrill propel Padres to 9-3 win
matsui.blurb: Samad Taylor’s three-hit day, first MLB homer and Jackson Merrill’s two-run home run lead the Padres to a 9-3 win over the Orioles
